courses.title: Tech Interview 101 - DSA and System Design
courses.description: Tech Interview 101 is a live, structured program that builds strong DSA skills and applies them to both Low-Level and High-Level System Design. Learn problem-solving, coding/debugging, OOP, SOLID, design patterns, and scalable architecture to crack interviews and grow into Developer, Tech Lead, or Architect roles.

courses.title: Java Backend Development with AI - Live
courses.description: The Java Backend Development course is an industry-focused program designed to build strong backend engineering skills using Java and the Spring ecosystem. It covers core and advanced Java, REST API development, Databases, Security, Caching, Microservices, Messaging, and Cloud-ready Deployment practices.

courses.title: Complete Data Analytics with AI
courses.description: Unlock the power of data! Elevate your expertise with our Mastering Data Analytics Course. Gain proficiency in Python, SQL, Excel, and Tableau for data analysis, visualization, and reporting. Explore hands-on, real-world projects and much more.

courses.title: System Design Training Program
courses.description: Build job-ready system design skills through hands-on classes focused on real world scalability. Learn system design fundamentals, distributed systems, low-level design, APIs, databases, caching, concurrency, SOLID principles, and design patterns for senior-level interviews and production systems.

courses.title: Generative AI Training Program - Live
courses.description: Master the skills to build and deploy advanced Gen AI solutions. This course takes you from Python & Deep Learning foundations to mastering Transformers and the Hugging Face ecosystem. You'll build with LangChain and RAG, and learn the LLM training lifecycle. Finally, advance to Agentic AI, using Crew AI to orchestrate powerful, autonomous multi-agent systems that solve complex problems.

courses.title: DevOps Engineering with AI : Planning to Production
courses.description: Master DevOps with our hire-ready, project-based course. Learn Linux, Git, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform, Ansible, and more Then prove it with production-style capstone projects taught during these practical sessions.

courses.title: Complete Data Science and Machine Learning Career Program with AI
courses.description: Master Data Science with our structured Complete Data Science Course covering basic to advance Data Analysis and Machine Learning and AI. Gain proficiency with mentor-led sessions. Also, you get recorded lectures and industry level projects that showcase real, job-ready skill and AI-powered solutions.

courses.title: MERN Full Stack Development with AI
courses.description: Become a job-ready full-stack developer with this online MERN stack program. Learn React for front-end, Node.js and Express for back-end, APIs, authentication, and deployment. Through hands-on, instructor-led sessions, you’ll build real-world projects, including a complete e-commerce platform, gaining the skills and confidence to launch your developer career

courses.title: Data Science Project Based Learning
courses.description: Master Data Science and Machine Learning with this intensive project-first course by GeeksforGeeks. Learn Python, Statistics, Analytics, ML by completing industry-level projects. Build a Job-ready portfolio with Expert online classes.

courses.title: Data Structures and Algorithms - Self Paced
courses.description: Most popular course on DSA trusted by 1,00,000+ students! Built with years of experience by industry experts, the course gives you a complete package of video lectures, practice problems, quizzes and contests. Enrol now to learn and master DSA skills!

courses.title: System Design: Low-Level to High-Level - Self Paced
courses.description: System Design is a premium self-paced course focused on design fundamentals and real-world system architecture. Learn object-oriented design, design patterns, and scalable distributed systems with databases, caching, and queues to crack system design interviews and advance as an SDE, Tech Lead, or Architect.

courses.title: Automation Testing - Self Paced
courses.description: Start your software testing career with this self-paced Automation Testing Course designed for beginners and experienced QA professionals. This top-rated online course teaches you everything from basics to advanced techniques of automation testing. Learn to automate tests using industry-leading tools like Selenium WebDriver, Jenkins, Postman, Cucumber BDD, and TestNG through hands-on projects.

courses.title: 21 Projects, 21 Days: MERN Stack Program
courses.description: The 21 Projects in 21 Days course is an intensive hands on journey into MERN Full Stack Web Development (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js), designed to help you learn by building real world projects every single lecture. From front end design to full stack applications, you’ll gain practical, job ready skills while creating a portfolio that truly stands out.

courses.title: DSA to Development: A Complete Guide
courses.description: DSA to Development is a premium, placement-focused program that turns DSA problem-solving into real development skills through track-based projects. Build strong fundamentals, learn industry problems, and get job-ready for full-stack, backend, Gen AI roles.

courses.title: 21 Projects, 21 Days: ML, Deep Learning & GenAI - Live
courses.description: The 21 Projects in 21 Days course is a hands-on journey through Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI, where you’ll build real-world projects daily — from predictions and image recognition to chatbots and AI agents — ending with 21 portfolio-ready projects that showcase your end-to-end AI skills.

courses.title: C++ Programming - Self Paced
courses.description: Become an ace in C++ Programming Language and master the C++ programming skills from basics to advanced. This C++ course is a complete package of videos, notes & contests from basics to STL libraries & algorithms. This CPP course is perfect for beginners as well as professionals. Enrol now to learn and master C++.

courses.title: Java Programming - Self Paced
courses.description: Master Java from basics to advanced with GeeksforGeeks’ Java Programming Course! Learn OOPs, data structures, multithreading, JDBC, and more through hands-on projects. Perfect for beginners and professionals aiming to excel in backend or Android development.

courses.title: Python Programming - Self Paced
courses.description: Learn Python from scratch with GeeksforGeeks’ Python Programming Basic Course! Master variables, loops, functions, and more through hands-on examples. Perfect for beginners aiming to build a strong foundation in coding and kickstart their tech career.

courses.title: JavaScript Programming - Self Paced
courses.description: Become a job-ready JavaScript developer with this premium course by GeeksforGeeks. Master JavaScript from fundamentals to advanced topics like execution context, closures, DOM, async programming, polyfills, and classes, with projects, practice, machine-coding problems, assignments, and contests.
